sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61006" key="kuprine/laion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κυπρῐνέλαιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n61006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κύπρινον</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
